source_message: User-provided GXNQ real-session label: 29-05-2026, MNQ, Trade, Inversion, long, entry 10:48, stop low of 10:45, TP1: 30,437.50
evidence_requirements: bundle must include 10:45 ET candle low for stop validation
bundle must include 10:48 ET confirmation candle for entry validation
bundle must prove Inversion long state: violated opposing FVG and valid close-through/confirmation before or at 10:48 ET
bundle must prove TP1 30437.50 is untaken liquidity at entry time
bundle must prove source health fresh, schema supported, and ICT Engine rows present as-of 10:48 ET

readiness_checks: no bars after as_of may be used for entry decision
10:45 ET candle low must define stop anchor or label stays unscored
10:48 ET candle close must define entry confirmation or label stays unscored
TP1 must cite untaken liquidity existing before/as-of entry
ICT Engine V2 rows/boxes/labels/levels must be captured with source health as-of entry
D1/H4/H1/15M/5M context from 09:30 ET must exist before 1M entry replay is trusted
15M/5M/1M entry window from 09:30 ET to 12:00 ET must be available for bar-by-bar replay

as_of_engine_evidence.note: Explicit as-of ICT evidence bridge for the GXNQ-labeled 10:48 ET Inversion: live/replay table was captured after the session, so future-mutated engine rows are not trusted for this decision. Prices/times cite the no-lookahead replay bars and the GXNQ label.

fvgs.evidence_note: Bullish iFVG evidence for the labeled 10:48 ET long; candle3/stop anchor is the 10:45 ET m5 bar low, confirmation is the 10:48 ET m1 close.

notes: This is the first GXNQ-labeled real-session validation target for V2.
Do not use later candles to repair the 10:48 decision. The detector must be evaluated as-of the entry confirmation time.
Stop is structural: low of the 10:45 ET candle. Resolve exact price from captured bars before marking replay.ready=true.
